summary: Tested Partner Subscription System (19€/month, 14-day trial, 12-month commitment). All 5 features working correctly: Partners Landing Page pricing section with correct pricing/trial/commitment info, Subscription API auto-creates trial for providers, Payment URL generation, Provider Dashboard subscription banner with trial status/days remaining/subscribe button, and Admin subscription stats endpoint.
seed_data_creation: None - subscription auto-created via GET /api/subscriptions/my for existing provider
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner subscription system fully functional. Subscription auto-creates 14-day trial for providers on first API access. Provider dashboard shows subscription banner with trial status and 'S'abonner maintenant' button. Payment links use SIMULATED Square checkout URLs (https://checkout.square.site/simulated/...) since real Square API may not have subscription plan configured.

feature_1_partners_landing_pricing.details: Pricing section visible at /partners with: 19€/month price, '14 JOURS D'ESSAI GRATUIT' badge, '12 mois' commitment text, 'Sans renouvellement automatique' note, CTA button linking to /register?role=provider. Hero badges also show '14 jours essai gratuit' and '19€/mois'.

feature_2_subscription_api.details: GET /api/subscriptions/my returns subscription with status=trial, price=19.0, commitment_months=12, trial_end in future. Auto-creates trial for providers without existing subscription.

feature_3_subscription_payment.details: POST /api/subscriptions/create-payment returns payment_url and amount=19.0. Payment URL format: https://checkout.square.site/simulated/subpay_xxx?amount=19.0&desc=Abonnement+Partenaire

feature_4_provider_dashboard_banner.details: Subscription banner visible between stats cards and nav tabs. Shows 'ESSAI GRATUIT — 14 JOURS RESTANTS' with trial status, '19€/mois' price mention, and 'S'ABONNER MAINTENANT' button. Button opens payment link in new tab with success toast.

feature_5_admin_subscriptions.details: GET /api/admin/subscriptions returns subscriptions list and stats object with total, trial, active, expired, cancelled counts and total_revenue.

mocked_apis.Square payment: SIMULATED - Uses simulated checkout URLs (https://checkout.square.site/simulated/...) when real Square API fails
